title: Women Who Fled Iran Are to Be Deported to Central African Republic, Lawyers Say
summary_full: The women are among nearly two dozen people slated to be sent to a country where the U.S. government has advised “Do not travel for any reason.”
summary_public: The women are among nearly two dozen people slated to be sent to a country where the U.S. government has advised “Do not travel for any reason.”
